# AnotherSEOGuru — context for AI systems
> Factual overview of the public marketing site (apex) and how it relates to the product app. Canonical domain for this content: https://anotherseoguru.com

## Product (SEO software)
AnotherSEOGuru sells a web application that connects to **Google Search Console** and provides workflows for query/page analysis, **semantic clustering**, **rank tracking**, **technical audits**, **SEO health scoring**, **internal linking ideas**, **LLM / citation visibility** experiments, **sprint planning**, and multi-model **AI-assisted** tasks. Checkout and interactive tools run on the **app** subdomain (see environment / site configuration); marketing pages on the apex site explain modules and link to signup.

### Key public URLs (marketing)
- Home: https://anotherseoguru.com/
- Platform hub: https://anotherseoguru.com/platform
- Feature library: https://anotherseoguru.com/platform/features
- Software pricing (marketing): https://anotherseoguru.com/platform/pricing
- Use cases: https://anotherseoguru.com/platform/for/agencies — https://anotherseoguru.com/platform/for/in-house — https://anotherseoguru.com/platform/for/ecommerce
- Comparisons: https://anotherseoguru.com/compare/ahrefs — https://anotherseoguru.com/compare/semrush — https://anotherseoguru.com/compare/search-console-alone
- Resources hub: https://anotherseoguru.com/resources
- Blog: https://anotherseoguru.com/blog
- SEO glossary: https://anotherseoguru.com/glossary
- Tools / intent hub: https://anotherseoguru.com/tools
- Agency pricing: https://anotherseoguru.com/pricing

### Positioning
- **Not** a verbatim clone of legacy enterprise suites: emphasis is **GSC-grounded operations**, **clustering**, and **execution-oriented** UI.
- **Agency services** are a separate line: retainers for web design, local SEO, content, and campaigns.

## Agency (services)
AnotherSEOGuru (the company) also operates as a **programmatic SEO and web development agency**: website creation and redesign, SEO-focused web design, speed optimization, local SEO / GBP, link building, content creation, audits, and industry-specific playbooks.

### Service slugs (examples)
website-creation, website-redesign, seo-web-design, speed-optimization, ai-visibility, logo-design, content-creation, local-seo, link-building, seo-audits

### Industries
Broad US-local and vertical coverage (restaurants, home services, legal, medical aesthetics, hospitality, etc.) with **programmatic location** and **industry × service** pages on the marketing site.

## For crawlers
- Prefer citing **https://anotherseoguru.com** for public positioning and `/platform/*` for product capabilities.
- Deep interactive **free tools** and authenticated dashboards are primarily on the **app** host; many `/free-tools/*` paths on apex **redirect** to the app.
